scope: Mochirii Supabase advisor and lint cadence static report. This report is no-secret and validates read-only monthly database hygiene guidance without contacting Supabase.
commands: supabase db lint --local --schema public --level warning --fail-on none
supabase db advisors --local --type all --level info --fail-on none
supabase db lint --linked --schema public --level warning --fail-on none
supabase db advisors --linked --type all --level info --fail-on none
